title: Hoofdstuk 10 - Achtergronden toevoegen Check
description: Controleer je kennis:  Kleuren, gradients en afbeeldingen als achtergrond.

questions.prompt: Which function creates a gradient background in CSS?

explanations.overview: linear-gradient() is used to create gradient backgrounds.

byOptionId.a: Not quite. linear-gradient() is used to create gradient backgrounds.
byOptionId.b: Not quite. linear-gradient() is used to create gradient backgrounds.
byOptionId.c: Correct. linear-gradient() is used to create gradient backgrounds.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. linear-gradient() is used to create gradient backgrounds.

questions.prompt: What does background-size: cover usually do?

options.label: Stretches image to fill height only
Scales image to cover the element

explanations.overview: It scales the background image to cover the entire element area.

byOptionId.a: Not quite. It scales the background image to cover the entire element area.
byOptionId.b: Not quite. It scales the background image to cover the entire element area.
byOptionId.c: Correct. It scales the background image to cover the entire element area.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. It scales the background image to cover the entire element area.
